data.name: TlpMain.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="DsoInfoStrip" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="3" /><Control Name="DsoTopStrip" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="3" /><Control Name="DsoResultStrip" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="3" /><Control Name="WindowDockPanel" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="3" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Absolute,1000,Percent,100,Absolute,200" /><Rows Styles="Absolute,40,Percent,100,AutoSize,0,Absolute,114" /></TableLayoutSettings>
